summary: Bypass the JSON resolver for /api/llms/*.txt endpoints; emit the verbatim text body, wrapping as {"content": ...} only when --json is set and the output is non-terminal.
reason: Two endpoints under /api/llms serve text/plain (agent-configuration.txt + a companion listing). The default JSON guard mangles their bodies; an enum-like override preserves the byte-for-byte response while still offering the JSON envelope for --json consumers.
validated_outcome: shipcheck green; 801 passed, 0 failed, 1306 skipped (full live dogfood).
